ddls:
CREATE TABLE "hardware_configurations" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each hardware configuration */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the hardware configuration */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the hardware configuration */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data center where the hardware is installed */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date when the hardware was installed */,
  "warranty_expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the warranty for the hardware expires */,
  "last_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the last maintenance */,
  "next_maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hardware_configurations_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the hardware configuration */,
  "size_kb" INTEGER /* Size in KB */,
  "bw_mb_s" INTEGER /* Bandwidth in MB/s */,
  "nominal_clock" REAL /* Nominal clock speed in GHz */,
  "actual_clock" REAL /* Actual clock speed in GHz */,
  "cy_nominal_LUP" REAL /* Cyclic efficiency nominal/LUP */,
  "cy_LUP" REAL /* Cyclic efficiency LUP */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data center where the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "cpu_utilization" REAL /* CPU utilization percentage */,
  "memory_utilization" REAL /* Memory utilization percentage */,
  "disk_utilization" REAL /* Disk utilization percentage */,
  "network_latency" REAL /* Network latency in milliseconds */,
  "power_consumption" REAL /* Power consumption in watts */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_config_id FOREIGN KEY ("config_id") REFERENCES hardware_configurations ("config_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_centers" (
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data center */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the data center */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data center */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the data center manager */,
  "manager_contact" TEXT /* Contact information of the data center manager */,
  "total_capacity" INTEGER /* Total capacity of the data center in terms of hardware units */,
  "current_capacity" INTEGER /* Current capacity of the data center in terms of hardware units */,
  "last_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the last inspection */,
  "next_inspection_date" TEXT /* Date of the next inspection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_center_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, engineer, analyst) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_modified_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the metrics */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the metric being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or device used */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session in seconds */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the related performance metric */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was generated */,
  "alert_description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity level of the alert (e.g., low, medium, high) */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "resolved_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" TEXT /* User who resolved the alert */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance metric related to the historical data */,
  "recorded_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was recorded */,
  "average_bw_mb_s" REAL /* Average bandwidth in MB/s for the day */,
  "average_cy_LUP" REAL /* Average cyclic efficiency LUP for the day */,
  "data_center_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data center where the data was recorded */,
  "average_cpu_utilization" REAL /* Average CPU utilization for the day */,
  "average_memory_utilization" REAL /* Average memory utilization for the day */,
  "average_disk_utilization" REAL /* Average disk utilization for the day */,
  "average_network_latency" REAL /* Average network latency for the day */,
  "average_power_consumption" REAL /* Average power consumption for the day */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_data_center_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_center_id") REFERENCES data_centers ("data_center_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
